title: Twilight Carnival: Gondola Dispatch Circuit
strategies: next-fit dispatch baseline: fill the current gondola until a party doesn't fit, then open a new one and never look back (reproduces the evaluator's weak reference)
first-fit in arrival order: board each party onto the lowest-index gondola with room, reusing earlier gaps but never reordering the queue
decreasing-order packing: seat the largest parties first via first-fit-decreasing / best-fit-decreasing, keeping the fewer-dispatch layout so small parties top off partially-filled gondolas
seeded local search / metaheuristics: start from a decreasing-order layout and swap/relocate parties or run perturb-and-reoptimize restarts to squeeze out remaining wasted seats
